schema_version.description: Schema version. Higher versions are loaded with a warning.

llm.description: LLM connection + bootstrap policy (v2). The engine is OpenAI-compatible and backend-agnostic; `provider` steers only the host-side bootstrap (model pull / daemon ensure / health probe). Runtime env (OMB_LLM_*; DRUDGE_LLM_* deprecated alias) still overrides.

provider.description: ollama = ensure serve + pull models. lmstudio = OpenAI /v1, models loaded via its UI/`lms` (no pull). openai-compatible = vLLM/llama.cpp/remote OpenAI (no pull).

base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. LM Studio is usually http://localhost:1234/v1.

model.description: Chat/synthesis model — used only by the ask/brief generation path.

embed_model.description: Embedding model — the only model drudge itself calls (kernel A). Authoritative when set.

embed_dim.description: Embedding dimension. MUST match embed_model's output (bge-m3=1024, nomic-embed-text=768, OpenAI 3-small=1536). Changing it needs `make reset` (vectors are reshaped).

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var holding the API key (providers that need auth). The key itself never lives in boring.json.

bootstrap.description: auto = bootstrap may start a daemon / pull models. manual = health-check only, never serve/pull (user owns the server, e.g. LM Studio).

embed_model.description: DEPRECATED (v1) — use llm.embed_model. Still honored as a fallback when llm.embed_model is unset.

embed_dim.description: DEPRECATED (v1) — use llm.embed_dim. Still honored as a fallback when llm.embed_dim is unset.

allow_company_origin.description: When true, origin:company notes (session experience from company work) are accepted corpus and do not flip the audit 'clean' flag. Default false flags them for review. Governs session experience only — company KB originals stay off-policy.

match.description: Case-insensitive substring matched against cwd or git remote URL.

settings_path.description: Optional agent settings file path override (e.g. MCP config or Claude Code settings.json). ~ expansion supported.

adapter.description: How this agent is wired. Inferred when omitted.
